events.title: Manhattan Concert Productions at Carnegie Hall
events.description: The series opens in Stern Auditorium with an evening spanning Mozart, contemporary choral masterworks, and gospel-inspired triumphs. Featuring Young musicians from Suzuki Music Academy and Cesar Chavez Academy, Octavo Series Chorus, and Festival Octavo Series Chorus performing works by Runestad, Vaughan Williams, Mozart, and Richard Smallwood's Total Praise.

events.title: Mitski: Nothing's About to Happen to Me Tour
events.description: The indie-pop priestess returns to NYC for the final night of her six-night residency supporting her eighth studio album. Featuring theatrical precision and raw, folk-punk intensity.

events.title: The Moth Storyslam
events.description: True stories told live without notes. A competitive storytelling event where performers share personal tales based on a theme.

events.title: Brooklyn Nets vs. Memphis Grizzlies
events.description: NBA basketball action as the Brooklyn Nets take on the Memphis Grizzlies at home.

events.title: Dizzy Gillespie All-Stars
events.description: Celebrating the legacy of Dizzy Gillespie with an all-star lineup of jazz musicians at the iconic Blue Note.

events.title: Golden Classical Music Awards Ceremony
events.description: Annual awards ceremony celebrating excellence in classical music performance and education.

events.title: Burnout Paradise
events.description: An immersive theatrical experience running through June 28, exploring themes of modern exhaustion and renewal.

events.title: Jesse Malin's Silver Manhattan
events.description: The former D Generation frontman presents his Silver Manhattan show, running through March 29.

events.title: Gabi Hartmann
events.description: Live music performance at the iconic downtown venue Le Poisson Rouge.

events.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise: bones North American Tour
events.description: Alternative rock band Rainbow Kitten Surprise brings their energetic live show to Brooklyn on their North American tour.

events.title: Tedeschi Trucks Band
events.description: The Grammy-winning blues-rock powerhouse led by Susan Tedeschi and Derek Trucks performs at the historic Beacon Theatre.

events.title: Chris Dave X DJ Jazzy Jeff X Savion Glover
events.description: An incredible collaboration between legendary drummer Chris Dave, turntablist DJ Jazzy Jeff, and tap dance master Savion Glover.

events.title: Bad Omens: Do You Feel Love North American Tour
events.description: Metalcore band Bad Omens brings their North American tour to Newark's Prudential Center.

events.title: Josman
events.description: French rapper and hip-hop artist Josman performs live in NYC.

events.title: Brooklyn Nets vs. Detroit Pistons
events.description: NBA basketball as the Brooklyn Nets face the Detroit Pistons at home.

events.title: Janeane Garofalo, Emil Wakim, Alex English & More
events.description: A night of stand-up comedy featuring comedy legend Janeane Garofalo and rising stars.

events.title: NYC Off-Broadway Week
events.description: Now through Thursday, March 12, 2026. NYC's Off-Broadway Week offers 2-for-1 tickets to acclaimed Off-Broadway productions including Silver Manhattan, La Gringa, The Office! A Musical Parody, and more.

events.title: Whitney Biennial 2026
events.description: The 82nd edition of the longest-running survey of contemporary American art. For the first time, anyone 25 and under can see the Whitney Biennial for free every single day.

events.title: Project Hail Mary - 70mm Special Presentations
events.description: Ryan Gosling stars in this sci-fi epic. Before the nationwide opening on March 20th, NYC audiences get special 70mm presentations for three days only (March 13-15).

events.title: Harry Styles on Saturday Night Live
events.venue: NBC Studios / TV Viewing Parties Citywide
events.description: Harry Styles hosts and performs as the musical guest on SNL, marking his seventh appearance and second time doing both roles in one episode. Citywide viewing parties expected.

events.title: New Edition with Boyz II Men & Toni Braxton
events.description: Legendary R&B group New Edition teams up with Boyz II Men and Toni Braxton for an unforgettable night of classic hits.

events.title: Artemas with Henry Morris and Ellah Boh
events.description: Alt-pop sensation Artemas brings his moody, synth-heavy sound to Terminal 5 on the LOVERCORE tour. Known for viral hit 'i like the way you kiss me'.

events.title: St. Lucia (Two Sets)
events.description: Electronic pop artist St. Lucia performs two sets at Brooklyn Steel, featuring his signature synth-pop sound.

events.title: HANABIE - North America Tour 2026
events.description: Japanese metalcore band HANABIE brings their high-energy show to Brooklyn Bowl on their North American tour.

events.title: The Summer Set
events.description: Pop-rock band The Summer Set performs at Irving Plaza.

events.title: Unbroken Chain: A Celebration of Phil Lesh
events.description: A celebration of the life and music of Grateful Dead bassist Phil Lesh, benefiting Sweet Relief. Features special guest performances.

events.title: West Village St. Patrick's Day Bar Fest
events.description: Celebrate St. Patrick's Day early in the West Village with music, drinks, and Irish cheer.

events.title: Jerrod Carmichael On Stage In Brooklyn
events.description: Comedian and actor Jerrod Carmichael performs stand-up at The Bell House.

events.title: Cornelia Murr
events.description: Indie folk artist Cornelia Murr performs at Music Hall of Williamsburg.

events.title: The Rock and Roll Playhouse: Music of Coldplay for Kids
events.description: Family-friendly concert featuring the music of Coldplay performed for kids and parents alike.

events.title: JACK Quartet at 92NY
events.description: JACK Quartet returns with works developed through JACK Studio, featuring world premieres by Tristan Perich, Keir GoGwilt, Jules Reidy, and Ailie Ormston.

events.title: Doc Fortnight 2026
events.description: MoMA's annual festival of international nonfiction film marks its 25th year with 33 new nonfiction films by emerging and established directors. Through March 12.

events.title: Patti Labelle - The 80/65 Tour
events.description: The Godmother of Soul celebrates her 80th birthday and 65 years in music with an unforgettable evening of hits.
